author: anon-13168fa2
content: Delivered: Created 02-the-methodology/01-how-we-build.md teaching VDD/IAR principles. Covers: the three roles (Builder/Human/Adversary), the build-verify-roast-fix loop, decomposition into trackable beads, fresh-context adversarial review, testing against hard truths (formal verification as concept), hallucination-based exit strategy, and all five core principles (anti-slop, forced negativity, linear accountability, entropy resistance, prove don't assume). Includes 4 exercises tying back to Phase 1 bookmark manager project. Updated README.md with Phase 2 section.
